title: Buried but not destroyed: the evolution from prompt cusps to NFW haloes
comment: 24 pages, 12 figures, 3 tables, submitted to MNRAS
summary: The internal structure of dark matter haloes encodes their assembly history and offers critical insight into the nature of dark matter and structure formation. Analytical studies and high-resolution simulations have recently predicted the formation of 'prompt cusps' - steep power-law density profiles that emerge rapidly from the monolithic collapse of primordial peaks. Yet, by $z=0$ most haloes are well described by Navarro-Frenk-White (NFW) density profiles, raising the question of how these early cusps are transformed in a cosmological setting. We address this problem using 64 zoom-in $N$-body simulations of eight haloes, each resimulated with eight different free-streaming wavenumbers to control the abundance of small-scale structure while keeping the large-scale environment fixed. To mitigate numerical discreteness effects, we classify artificial fragments and genuine subhaloes with a physically motivated procedure based on matching subhaloes to their progenitor peaks. At the population level, we demonstrate that haloes initially form prompt cusps, and their profiles subsequently transition towards the NFW form. Our study reveals three distinct pathways by which prompt cusps evolve: major mergers, accretion of artificial fragments, and interactions with large-scale filaments, each having a distinct impact on the inner density profile. In particular, we show that the original power-law cusp remains visible in the profile of particles associated with the primordial peak even when the total halo profile is already NFW-like. This work highlights the imprint of early collapse on present-day halo structure and provides new insights into the origin of the universality of the NFW profile.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过N体模拟揭示了暗物质晕的早期"瞬时尖峰"密度分布如何通过三种不同途径演化为NFW轮廓，并发现原始尖峰在总晕轮廓已呈NFW状时仍可见。
AI.motivation: 暗物质晕的内部结构编码了它们的组装历史，对理解暗物质性质和结构形成至关重要。虽然理论和模拟预测了"瞬时尖峰"的形成，但大多数晕在z=0时都呈现NFW密度轮廓，这引发了关于早期尖峰如何在宇宙学环境中转变的问题。
AI.method: 使用64个zoom-in N体模拟，对8个晕进行重模拟，每个晕采用8种不同的自由流动波数来控制小尺度结构的丰度，同时保持大尺度环境固定。通过基于匹配子晕与其前身峰的物理动机程序来区分人工碎片和真实子晕。
AI.result: 研究表明晕最初形成瞬时尖峰，随后其轮廓向NFW形式转变。揭示了三种不同的演化途径：主要合并、人工碎片吸积以及与大尺度纤维结构的相互作用，每种途径对内部密度轮廓都有独特影响。特别发现，即使总晕轮廓已呈NFW状，原始尖峰仍可在与原始峰相关的粒子轮廓中可见。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作突出了早期坍缩对现今晕结构的印记，并为NFW轮廓普遍性的起源提供了新见解，表明原始尖峰通过不同物理过程演化为观测到的NFW轮廓。

title: Exploring Cosmic Dawn with PANORAMIC II: Cosmic Variance and Galaxy Clustering at $z\sim10$
summary: Observational campaigns with JWST have revealed a higher-than-expected abundance of UV-bright galaxies at $z\gtrsim10$, with various proposed theoretical explanations. A powerful complementary constraint to break degeneracies between different models is galaxy clustering. In this paper, we combine PANORAMIC pure parallel and legacy imaging along 34 independent sightlines to measure the cosmic variance ($σ_{\rm CV}$) in the number count of Lyman break galaxies at $z\sim10$ which is directly related to their clustering strength. We find $σ_{\rm CV}=0.96^{+0.20}_{-0.18}$, $1.46^{+0.54}_{-0.44}$, and $1.71^{+0.72}_{-0.59}$ per NIRCam pointing ($\sim9.7\,{\rm arcmin}^2$, $\lesssim1.5\,{\rm pMpc}$ at $z\sim10$) for galaxies with M$_{\rm UV}<-19.5$, $-20$, and $-20.5$. Comparing to galaxies in the UniverseMachine, we find that $σ_{\rm CV}$ is consistent with our measurements, but that the number densities are a factor $\gtrsim5$ lower. We implement simple models in the UniverseMachine that represent different physical mechanisms to enhance the number density of UV-bright galaxies. All models decrease $σ_{\rm CV}$ by placing galaxies at fixed M$_{\rm UV}$ in lower mass halos, but they do so to varying degrees. Combined constraints on $σ_{\rm CV}$ and the UVLF tentatively disfavor models that globally increase the star formation efficiency (SFE) or the scatter in the M$_{\rm UV}$-$M_{\rm halo}$ relation, while models that decrease the mass-to-light ratio, or assume a power-law scaling of the SFE with $M_{\rm halo}$ agree better with the data. We show that with sufficient additional independent sightlines, robust discrimination between models is possible, paving the way for powerful constraints on the physics of early galaxy evolution through NIRCam pure parallel imaging.

AI.tldr: 通过JWST观测发现高红移(z>10)星系数量超出预期，本文利用PANORAMIC巡天数据测量z~10星系的空间分布方差，结合宇宙模拟机(UniverseMachine)分析不同物理机制对星系形成的影响。
AI.motivation: JWST观测显示z>10处存在比预期更多的UV明亮星系，但不同理论模型之间存在简并性。星系的空间聚类测量可以作为区分不同模型的关键约束条件。
AI.method: 结合PANORAMIC巡天的34个独立视线方向数据，测量z~10莱曼断裂星系的数量计数中的宇宙方差(σ_CV)，该方差直接反映星系的聚类强度。将观测结果与UniverseMachine模拟进行比较，并实现不同的物理机制模型。
AI.result: 测量得到不同UV亮度阈值下的宇宙方差：M_UV<-19.5时为0.96^{+0.20}_{-0.18}，<-20时为1.46^{+0.54}_{-0.44}，<-20.5时为1.71^{+0.72}_{-0.59}。与UniverseMachine相比，σ_CV一致但数密度低5倍以上。不同物理机制模型对σ_CV的影响程度不同。
AI.conclusion: 结合σ_CV和UV光度函数的约束，倾向于排除全局增加恒星形成效率或M_UV-M_halo关系散射的模型，而支持降低质量-光比或假设恒星形成效率与晕质量呈幂律关系的模型。增加独立视线方向可以更好地区分不同模型。

title: Primordial Black Holes as Seeds for Extremely Overmassive AGN Observed by JWST
summary: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) has recently identified Abell 2744-QSO1 as a compact, metal-poor, black hole (BH) dominated galaxy at $z\simeq 7$. This system exhibits an extreme black-hole-to-stellar mass ratio and unusually low metallicity, posing significant challenges to BH seeding models. Motivated by these discoveries, we perform high-resolution cosmological simulations with a massive primordial black hole (PBH; $M_{\rm BH}=5\times10^7\,M_\odot$) seed, incorporating for the first time a fully coupled treatment of PBH accretion, BH feedback, and Population~III/II star formation and stellar feedback. Although PBHs accelerate structure formation through the seed effect, the associated strong thermal feedback from the accretion delays the onset of star formation to $z\lesssim 10$, producing short, bursty episodes throughout the subsequent evolution. PBH-driven outflows expel enriched gas from the nucleus, while sustained inflows from the intergalactic medium continuously replenish pristine material. This feedback-regulated cycle naturally yields low accretion rates ($\dot{m}_{\rm BH}/\dot{m}_{\rm edd} \sim 1-10\%$), subsolar metallicities ($Z/Z_\odot\lesssim10^{-2}$) and extreme $M_{\rm BH}/M_\star$ ratios during both the initial star-forming phase and the subsequent quenching phases, in excellent agreement with JWST observations. Our results demonstrate that massive PBHs offer a viable pathway for forming the most extreme high-redshift systems, providing a physically motivated explanation for the extraordinary properties of Abell 2744-QSO1, as a sub-class of the broader population of JWST-discovered "little red dots".

AI.tldr: JWST观测到Abell 2744-QSO1星系具有极端黑洞-恒星质量比和低金属丰度，挑战现有黑洞形成模型。研究通过包含原初黑洞吸积和反馈的高分辨率宇宙学模拟，成功解释了这些观测特征。
AI.motivation: JWST发现Abell 2744-QSO1星系具有极端黑洞-恒星质量比和异常低金属丰度，这对传统黑洞形成模型构成挑战，需要新的物理机制来解释这些观测特征。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率宇宙学模拟，首次包含质量巨大的原初黑洞种子（5×10^7太阳质量），并完全耦合处理原初黑洞吸积、黑洞反馈、以及第三/二代恒星形成和恒星反馈。
AI.result: 模拟显示：原初黑洞通过种子效应加速结构形成，但强烈的热反馈延迟恒星形成至z<10；黑洞驱动的外流排出富金属气体，而持续内流补充原始物质；形成低吸积率、亚太阳金属丰度和极端黑洞-恒星质量比的系统，与JWST观测高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 大质量原初黑洞为形成极端高红移系统提供了可行途径，能够自然解释Abell 2744-QSO1的异常性质，这类系统可能是JWST发现的"小红点"星系的一个子类。

title: How is Cold Gas Loaded into Galactic Nuclear Outflows?
comment: To appear in ApJ. Comments welcome!
summary: The origin of the multiphase gas within the Fermi/eROSITA bubbles is crucial for understanding Galactic Center (GC) feedback. We use HI4PI data to investigate the kinematics and physical properties of high-velocity clouds (HVCs) toward the GC. Our results reveal that the HVCs exhibit a distinct asymmetric distribution, closely associated with the bar-driven tilted dust lanes and the distorted overshooting streams. We propose that powerful nuclear outflows interact with these gas-rich, off-plane structures, striping and entraining cold gas from the outer Galactic regions (R_GC~0.5--1.7 kpc) rather than solely from the region of the central molecular zone (CMZ; R_GC<0.3 kpc). In this scenario, as the Galactic bar drives gas inflows along the dust lanes, nuclear outflows simultaneously break through the CMZ, sweeping up and ablating cold gas from the boundary layer of these pre-existing structures. This process naturally accounts for the observed high turbulence, complex spectral signatures, and anomalous spatial-kinematic gas patterns, as well as multiwavelength asymmetries of the bubbles. The HVCs are accelerated to about 230--340 km/s over a dynamical time of ~3--6 Myr. When the multiphase, inhomogeneous composition of the gas is included, the estimated gas outflow rate reaches ~1 Msun/yr. This value is comparable to the bar-driven inflow rate, indicating a tightly coupled gas cycle in the inner Galaxy. Our research highlights the critical role of bar-driven gas dynamics and nuclear feedback in the secular evolution of the Milky Way, offering a valuable paradigm for investigating gas cycles in external galaxies.

AI.tldr: 研究利用HI4PI数据分析费米/eROSITA气泡内多相气体来源，发现高速云与棒驱动尘埃带相关，提出核外流与这些结构相互作用剥离冷气体的机制，解释了气泡观测特征。
AI.motivation: 理解费米/eROSITA气泡内多相气体的起源对于认识银河系中心反馈机制至关重要，特别是这些气体是否仅来自中心分子区还是更广泛的银河系区域。
AI.method: 使用HI4PI数据研究高速云（HVCs）的运动学和物理性质，分析其分布与棒驱动倾斜尘埃带和扭曲超射流的关系，提出核外流与这些结构相互作用的物理模型。
AI.result: 高速云呈现不对称分布，与棒驱动尘埃带紧密相关；核外流从外部银河区域剥离冷气体而非仅来自中心分子区；气体被加速到230-340 km/s，时标3-6 Myr；气体流出率约1 Msun/yr，与棒驱动流入率相当。
AI.conclusion: 银河系棒驱动气体动力学和核反馈在银河系长期演化中起关键作用，为研究外部星系气体循环提供了有价值的范例，揭示了内银河系紧密耦合的气体循环机制。

title: The role of supernova remnants for the emergence of pre-biotic chemistry in molecular clouds
comment: This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: There is growing evidence that the Sun might have formed within a nebula impacted by at least one SNR. In this scenario, ejecta and shocks from SNRs may have provided the elements on which life as we know it is based. Investigating the chemical complexity of molecular clouds impacted by SNRs is therefore essential to unveil the star formation process and how life appeared on Earth. In this paper, we exploit this scientific questions and describe which technical specifications will drive in future generation telescopes.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨太阳可能形成于受超新星遗迹影响的星云中，研究此类分子云的化学复杂性对揭示恒星形成过程和地球生命起源至关重要，并讨论了未来望远镜的技术需求。
AI.motivation: 越来越多的证据表明太阳可能形成于受超新星遗迹影响的星云中，超新星遗迹的喷射物和冲击波可能提供了生命所需的基本元素。研究受超新星遗迹影响的分子云的化学复杂性对于揭示恒星形成过程和地球生命起源机制至关重要。
AI.method: 论文基于这一科学问题，探讨了未来一代望远镜需要满足的技术规格要求，以更好地研究受超新星遗迹影响的分子云的化学复杂性。
AI.result: 论文未提供具体的研究结果，而是聚焦于阐述未来望远镜的技术需求，以支持对受超新星遗迹影响的分子云的化学复杂性研究。
AI.conclusion: 研究受超新星遗迹影响的分子云的化学复杂性对于理解恒星形成和生命起源具有重要意义，未来望远镜需要特定的技术规格来支持这一研究方向。

title: Revealing the baryon cycle in Galaxy Clusters: connecting galaxy dynamics and gas thermodynamics using (sub-)mm-wave and optical IFU surveys
comment: Cover and 3 pages with 2 PDF figures. This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: Observations in the visible and near infrared are transforming our view of the processes affecting galaxy evolution, much of which is dominated by interactions with the large scale environment. Yet a complete picture is missing, as no corresponding high resolution view of the warm/hot intracluster, circumgalactic, and intergalactic media exists over large areas and a comparably broad range of redshifts. Combined with wide-field optical IFU surveys such as CATARSIS, a large diameter sub-mm telescope with a degree-scale field of view would enable a joint view of galaxy dynamics and gas thermodynamics, transforming our understanding of environmental processes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过结合宽场光学IFU巡天（如CATARSIS）和大口径亚毫米波望远镜，实现对星系动力学和气体热力学的同时观测，以全面理解环境过程对星系演化的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前可见光和近红外观测虽然正在改变我们对星系演化过程的理解，特别是大尺度环境的影响，但缺乏对应的高分辨率观测来研究暖/热星系团内介质、星系周介质和星系际介质，这阻碍了获得完整的星系演化图景。
AI.method: 建议结合宽场光学积分视场单元（IFU）巡天（如CATARSIS）与具有度级视场的大口径亚毫米波望远镜，实现对星系动力学和气体热力学的联合观测。
AI.result: 该方法将填补当前观测的空白，提供对星系环境过程更全面的理解，但目前处于概念阶段，尚未有具体观测结果。
AI.conclusion: 结合宽场光学IFU巡天和大口径亚毫米波望远镜的联合观测方法，将能够同时研究星系动力学和气体热力学，从而彻底改变我们对环境过程影响星系演化的理解。

title: AtLAST -- Cosmology with submillimetre galaxies magnification bias
comment: This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: Magnification bias offers a uniquely powerful and independent route to cosmological information. As a gravitational-lensing observable, it probes galaxy-matter correlations without relying on galaxy shapes, PSF modelling, or intrinsic-alignment corrections. Its sensitivity spans both geometry and growth: magnification bias simultaneously responds to the matter density, the amplitude of structure, and the redshift evolution of dark energy (DE) below $z \leq 1$. Importantly, its parameter degeneracy directions differ from those of shear, Baryon Acoustic Oscillations (BAO), and Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) data, making it a complementary and consistency-check probe with substantial diagnostic value for the next decade of precision cosmology. However, the current potential of magnification bias is restricted by limited sky coverage, catalogue inhomogeneities, and insufficiently precise redshift or number-count characterisation. A next-generation wide-field submillimetre facility like AtLAST -- capable of uniform, deep surveys and spectroscopic mapping -- would overcome these limitations and transform magnification bias into a competitive, high-precision cosmological tool.

AI.tldr: 放大偏差作为引力透镜观测手段，提供独立于其他方法的宇宙学信息，对物质密度、结构振幅和暗能量演化敏感，但当前受限于观测条件，下一代亚毫米波设施将使其成为高精度宇宙学工具。
AI.motivation: 放大偏差作为引力透镜观测手段，具有独特的优势：不依赖星系形状、PSF建模或内禀对齐校正，能独立探测星系-物质关联，其参数简并方向与剪切、BAO和CMB数据不同，可作为互补和一致性检验的探针。
AI.method: 利用放大偏差作为引力透镜观测手段，通过星系-物质关联来探测宇宙学信息。该方法对物质密度、结构振幅和暗能量演化敏感，特别适用于z≤1的红移范围。
AI.result: 当前放大偏差的潜力受到天空覆盖范围有限、星表不均匀性以及红移或数量计数表征精度不足的限制。然而，其参数简并方向与剪切、BAO和CMB数据不同，具有互补性和一致性检验价值。
AI.conclusion: 下一代宽视场亚毫米波设施（如AtLAST）能够通过均匀、深度巡天和光谱测绘克服当前限制，将放大偏差转变为具有竞争力的高精度宇宙学工具，为未来十年的精确宇宙学提供重要诊断价值。

title: Can dwarf spheroidal galaxies host a central black hole ?
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ. Comments are welcome
summary: We construct mass models of Milky Way dwarf spheroidal galaxies to place constraints on the central black hole (BH) masses they can host. We model the galaxies as a three-component system consisting of the stars, dark matter halo, and a central black hole, using the Osipkov--Merritt--Cuddeford class of anisotropic distribution function. The posterior distribution of black hole mass remains flat toward the low-mass end, indicating that the kinematic data places an upper limit on the black hole mass. Our analysis yields a 95% credible upper limit of $\log(M_{\bullet}/M_{\odot}) < 6$. We combine our results with black hole mass measurements and upper limits from the literature to construct a unified $M_{\bullet}$--$σ_{}$ relation spanning $σ_{} \sim 10$--$300,\mathrm{km,s^{-1}}$, described by $\log(M_{\bullet}) = 8.32 + 4.08,\log\left(σ_{}/200,\mathrm{km,s^{-1}}\right)$, with an intrinsic scatter of $σ_{\rm int} = 0.55$. We compare the inferred limits to models of black hole growth via momentum-driven accretion and stellar capture, which predict black hole masses in the range $10^{3}$--$10^{4},M_{\odot}$ for the range $σ_{} \sim 6$--$12,\mathrm{km,s^{-1}}$, in close agreement with the $M_{\bullet}$--$σ_{*}$ relation within the 95% credible upper limits on the black hole masses derived in this work.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过构建银河系矮球状星系的质量模型，约束了这些星系中心黑洞的质量上限，并建立了统一的黑洞质量-速度弥散关系。
AI.motivation: 研究银河系矮球状星系中心黑洞的质量限制，以更好地理解黑洞形成和增长机制，特别是在低质量星系中的黑洞演化。
AI.method: 将星系建模为三组分系统（恒星、暗物质晕和中心黑洞），使用Osipkov-Merritt-Cuddeford各向异性分布函数类，通过运动学数据分析黑洞质量的后验分布。
AI.result: 黑洞质量后验分布在低质量端保持平坦，表明运动学数据仅能提供黑洞质量上限。获得95%置信上限为log(M•/M⊙) < 6。建立了统一的黑洞质量-速度弥散关系：log(M•) = 8.32 + 4.08 log(σ/200 km s⁻¹)，内在弥散为0.55。
AI.conclusion: 推断的质量限制与动量驱动吸积和恒星捕获模型预测的黑洞质量范围(10³-10⁴ M⊙)一致，这些预测与M•-σ*关系在95%置信上限内相符，支持了黑洞增长机制的理论模型。

title: Local Group dwarf galaxies as dark matter probes
comment: Submitted to the ESO call for White Papers
summary: Unveiling the fundamental nature of non-baryonic dark matter (DM) has profound implications for our understanding of the Universe and of the physical laws that govern it. Its manifestation as an additional source of matter necessary to explain astrophysical and cosmological observations indicates either a breakdown of General Relativity or that the current Standard Model of Particle Physics is incomplete. In the standard Cold DM (CDM) paradigm, DM consists of collisionless non-relativistic particles with negligible non-gravitational interactions. This simple hypothesis is very successful on large and intermediate scales, but faces challenges on small galactic scales. Local Group (LG) dwarf galaxies can play a fundamental role to elucidate whether these challenges stem from poorly understood fundamental baryonic processes or instead indicate that alternative DM scenarios need to be considered. In particular, a systematic determination of their DM halo properties as a function of stellar mass and star formation histories (SFH) will provide crucial observational benchmarks for models to deal with the trickiest issue that prevents us from advancing in our understanding of DM nature, i.e. the impact of baryonic processes in altering the properties of the inner regions of DM haloes. Such systematic study would require assembling accurate l.o.s. velocities (and metallicities) for several thousands of stars per galaxy, for an heterogeneous sample of target galaxies, spanning order of magnitudes in stellar mass and covering distances from about 100 kpc to more than 1 Mpc. This calls for both multi-objects spectrographs on 12m-class telescopes with fov of a few deg2 and a multiplex power in the several 1000s with the capability of providing dense sampling of the innermost regions, as well as for wide-area multi-objects spectrographs with fov of several arcmin2 on 30-40m class telescopes.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过系统研究本地群矮星系的暗物质晕性质，为解决小尺度星系形成问题提供关键观测基准，以区分标准冷暗物质模型与重子过程影响
AI.motivation: 暗物质本质是宇宙学和粒子物理学的核心问题。标准冷暗物质模型在大尺度上成功，但在小尺度星系形成上面临挑战。本地群矮星系是研究这些挑战的理想实验室，可以区分这些问题是源于未充分理解的重子过程，还是需要替代暗物质模型
AI.method: 通过系统测定本地群矮星系的暗物质晕性质作为恒星质量和恒星形成历史的函数。需要为异质样本星系（距离约100 kpc到超过1 Mpc）中的每个星系收集数千颗恒星的精确视线速度和金属丰度数据。这需要12米级望远镜（视场几平方度，复用能力数千）和30-40米级望远镜（视场几平方角分）上的多目标光谱仪
AI.result: 论文提出了一个观测计划框架，但尚未实施具体观测。提出的方法将为理解暗物质晕内部区域受重子过程影响的程度提供关键观测基准
AI.conclusion: 系统研究本地群矮星系的暗物质分布特性是解决暗物质本质问题的关键一步。通过建立恒星质量、恒星形成历史与暗物质晕性质之间的关系，可以为区分标准冷暗物质模型与替代模型提供决定性观测证据，并量化重子过程对暗物质晕内部结构的影响

title: Mass Assembly and Chemical Complexity in the Milky Way
comment: This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of next generation sub-mm facilities
summary: (Sub-)millimeter spectral lines can be used not only to understand the chemical complexity and enrichment history of an observed portion of our Galaxy, but with spectrally resolved lines, they reveal the physical conditions, dynamics, and even the ionisation state and magnetic field strengths of the gas component of our Galaxy. They are prime tracers of mass assembly and structure formation across scales.

AI.conclusion: 亚毫米/毫米波谱线是研究银河系质量聚集和结构形成的关键工具，能够提供多尺度、多物理参数的综合信息

title: Halo Lightcones with Optimised Orientation and Interpolation in Cosmological Simulations -- an application to mock H$α$ selected galaxies
comment: submitted to A&A journal, 17 pages, 10 main figures
summary: A critical step to create realistic mock catalogs that support large-scale photometric and spectroscopic sky surveys is the production of cosmological simulations that accurately model the survey observables taking into account the redshift-dependent galaxy formation and evolution processes. Here we develop an efficient framework, HOLCon (Halo Optimised Lightcone Constructor), for post-facto construction of dark matter halo lightcones from simulations and use them to generate a mock galaxy catalogue. HOLCon includes a module to optimise the lightcone's orientation within the simulation box, minimising repeated structures when the survey volume exceeds a single box -- a common challenge in modern surveys. A linear interpolation scheme tracks the evolution of halo properties across snapshots. Applied to the publicly available Uchuu simulation, we construct a lightcone of 50 ${\rm deg}^2$ and extending up to $z = 10$, providing representative coverage of deep fields of Stage IV surveys. We validate the lightcone for cosmological applications by comparing the dark matter halo clustering in the lightcone with those from the original simulation snapshots. Subsequently, we make the galaxy-halo connection on the lightcone with a redshift extended version of the SciPIC algorithm producing a comprehensive set of descriptive galaxy attributes. HOLCon leverages Dask, a scalable parallel computing pythonic framework for fast construction of dark matter halo lightcones enabling rapid creation of multiple statistical realizations essential for robust cosmological inference. The produced galaxy mock makes predictions for clustering of H$α$ emitters, making it a useful cosmology resource.

AI.tldr: HOLCon框架用于从宇宙学模拟中高效构建暗物质晕光锥并生成模拟星系目录，通过优化光锥方向减少重复结构，应用于Uchuu模拟创建了50平方度、红移达10的光锥，验证了宇宙学应用的有效性。
AI.motivation: 为支持大规模巡天观测，需要创建能够准确模拟观测数据并考虑红移依赖的星系形成演化过程的宇宙学模拟，但现有方法在处理超过单个模拟盒体积的巡天时面临重复结构的挑战。
AI.method: 开发了HOLCon框架，包含优化光锥方向的模块以减少重复结构，采用线性插值方案跟踪晕属性在快照间的演化，利用Dask并行计算框架快速构建暗物质晕光锥，并应用扩展版SciPIC算法建立星系-晕连接。
AI.result: 成功构建了50平方度、红移达10的光锥，验证了暗物质晕聚类与原始模拟的一致性，生成了包含全面星系属性的模拟星系目录，能够预测Hα发射体的聚类特性。
AI.conclusion: HOLCon提供了一个高效、可扩展的框架，能够快速构建暗物质晕光锥并生成高质量的模拟星系目录，为宇宙学推断提供了重要的计算资源，特别适用于现代大规模巡天观测的数据分析需求。

title: NGC 3521 as the Milky Way near twin: spectral energy distribution from UV to radio decameter ranges
summary: Milky Way analogues (MWAs) are usually selected from structural and kinematic properties, but robust SED-based similarity criteria are limited by heterogeneous photometry and incomplete wavelength coverage. We present a homogeneous, aperture-photometry SED of the Milky Way near-twin NGC~3521 from the ultraviolet to the radio decameter range. Fluxes are measured within a fixed elliptical isophotal aperture using GALEX, SDSS, WISE, Spitzer/MIPS, Herschel/PACS+SPIRE, and VLA data, and supplemented by meter/decameter constraints. We report new observations obtained in Jan-Feb 2022 with the Ukrainian T-shape radio telescope and derive, for the first time, an upper limit in the 24--32~MHz band. The UV-to-decameter SED (27 points) is modelled with \textsc{CIGALE}, including a dedicated low-frequency radio prescription (\texttt{radio_extra}) that accounts for emission and absorption effects. Using ZTF and NEOWISE data (2014--2025), we detect genuine nuclear variability; optical trends at $\sim2^{\prime\prime}$ primarily trace the compact nucleus, while NEOWISE variability reflects a mix of nuclear changes and warm-dust emission within the larger aperture. The preferred fit yields $M_\star \simeq 6.0\times10^{10},M_\odot$, ${\rm SFR}\simeq1.65,M_\odot,{\rm yr}^{-1}$, $M_{\rm dust}\simeq1.3\times10^{8},M_\odot$, and an effective dust temperature of $\sim23$~K. The decameter constraint gives $S_{28,{\rm MHz}}<11.22$~Jy, consistent with expectations for a Milky Way-like system placed at 10.7~Mpc. We conclude that an integrated, homogeneous SED, especially below 100~MHz, provides a complementary diagnostic for identifying and validating MWAs and for interpreting how Milky Way properties would appear to an external observer.

AI.tldr: 该研究为银河系近双胞胎NGC 3521构建了从紫外到分米波段的均匀光谱能量分布，首次获得24-32MHz频段上限，并检测到核区真实变异性，为识别银河系类似星系提供了新诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 当前选择银河系类似星系主要基于结构和运动学特性，但缺乏基于光谱能量分布的稳健相似性标准，主要受限于非均匀测光和波长覆盖不完整的问题。
AI.method: 使用GALEX、SDSS、WISE、Spitzer/MIPS、Herschel/PACS+SPIRE和VLA数据，在固定椭圆等光轮廓孔径内测量通量，补充米波/分米波约束，包括乌克兰T形射电望远镜2022年1-2月的新观测。使用CIGALE建模UV到分米波SED，包含专门的低频射电处方。利用ZTF和NEOWISE数据（2014-2025）检测核区变异性。
AI.result: 获得27个点的UV到分米波SED，首次获得24-32MHz频段上限（S28,MHz<11.22 Jy）。最佳拟合给出恒星质量约6.0×10^10 M⊙，恒星形成率约1.65 M⊙/yr，尘埃质量约1.3×10^8 M⊙，有效尘埃温度约23K。检测到真实核区变异性，光学变化主要追踪致密核区，NEOWISE变异性反映核区变化和较大孔径内暖尘埃发射的混合。
AI.conclusion: 集成的、均匀的光谱能量分布，特别是在100MHz以下，为识别和验证银河系类似星系提供了补充诊断方法，有助于解释银河系特性在外部观测者眼中的表现。

title: Searching for Intermediate-Mass Black Holes in Milky Way satellites
summary: Intermediate-mass black holes (IMBHs), with masses between roughly $10^2\,M_\odot$ and $10^5\,M_\odot$, represent a largely uncharted component of the black-hole (BH) population. They are theoretically predicted to form in several early-Universe pathways, including the remnants of massive Population III stars, the runaway collapse of dense stellar clusters, and the direct collapse of metal-poor gas. Establishing whether IMBHs are present in dwarf galaxy satellites of the Milky Way (MW), and with what occupation fraction - i.e. the fraction of galaxies with a certain stellar mass that host a central BH - provides one of the most incisive tests of BH seed formation models. Despite their importance, present dynamical constraints on IMBHs remain weak. Dynamical IMBH masses or upper limits are available for very few such systems, with secure detections in less than ten cases. A next-generation wide-field spectroscopic facility, capable of combining deep multiplexed stellar spectroscopy with high-resolution integral-field observations of galaxy centers, would open access to IMBH masses in the $\leq10\,M_\odot$ regime. Such an advance would make possible - for the first time - a robust measurement of the IMBH occupation fraction in dwarf galaxies. A key scientific requirement for the coming decades is to establish the observational and instrumental capabilities needed to detect or tightly constrain IMBHs in nearby dwarf galaxies, particularly in the $\simeq10^3-10^4 \,M_\odot$ mass range, and thereby enable a measurement of their occupation fraction. Such a measurement is fundamental for distinguishing between competing scenarios for the formation of BH seeds in the early Universe.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了中等质量黑洞（IMBHs）的研究现状，指出目前观测证据有限，并提出了通过新一代光谱设施测量矮星系中IMBHs占据分数的科学目标。
AI.motivation: 中等质量黑洞（IMBHs）是黑洞种群中研究较少的组成部分，其存在与否以及占据分数（occupation fraction）是检验早期宇宙黑洞种子形成模型的关键测试。目前对IMBHs的动力学约束仍然很弱，只有不到十个可靠的探测案例。
AI.method: 论文提出需要新一代宽视场光谱设施，能够结合深度多路复用恒星光谱和高分辨率积分场观测星系中心，以探测质量≤10^4 M⊙范围内的IMBHs，从而测量矮星系中IMBHs的占据分数。
AI.result: 目前IMBHs的观测证据非常有限，只有不到十个可靠的探测案例。需要新一代观测设施才能实现对IMBHs占据分数的稳健测量。
AI.conclusion: 未来几十年的关键科学需求是建立观测和仪器能力，以探测或严格约束附近矮星系中的IMBHs，特别是在10^3-10^4 M⊙质量范围内，从而实现对占据分数的测量，这将有助于区分早期宇宙黑洞种子形成的竞争模型。

title: Connection between galaxy morphology and dark-matter halo structure II: predicting disk structure from dark-matter halo properties
summary: We investigate how galactic disk structures connect to the detailed properties of their host dark-matter halos using the TNG50 simulation. From the hydrodynamic and matched dark-matter-only runs, we measure a comprehensive list of halo properties describing density structure, angular momentum, shape, assembly history, and environment. Using the morphological decomposition developed in Paper I, we quantify the sizes, scale heights, and mass fractions of the disk components for galaxies at $0 \le z \le 4$. Random Forest (RF) regression shows halo properties alone predict disk size and thickness with high accuracy, while Symbolic Regression (SR) provides compact empirical relations with slightly lower accuracy. Disk height is consistently easier to predict than disk size, and lower-mass halos yield higher accuracy than massive halos. Predictions based on halo properties measured in the full-physics hydro simulations outperform those based on the matched dark-matter-only halos, reflecting the imprint of baryonic restructuring on the inner halo. SHAP analysis reveals that the most informative halo parameters include concentration, Einasto shape, global and inner spin, and recent mass accretion, though their importance varies across disk properties. We show that correlations between disk size and the density-profile shape arise primarily from disk-induced modification of the inner halo, rather than a primordial connection. Finally, we point out that disks become more extended with respect to their host halos at higher redshift in low-mass halos, while massive high-redshift halos show the opposite trend. We provide SR-based prescriptions that accurately map halo properties to disk structures, offering practical tools for galaxy-halo modeling.

AI.tldr: 使用TNG50模拟研究星系盘结构与暗物质晕性质的关系，通过随机森林和符号回归建立预测模型，发现盘高度比盘大小更容易预测，低质量晕预测精度更高
AI.motivation: 探究星系盘结构（大小、厚度）与宿主暗物质晕详细性质之间的物理联系，为星系-晕建模提供实用工具
AI.method: 使用TNG50流体动力学模拟和匹配的纯暗物质模拟，测量晕的密度结构、角动量、形状、组装历史等综合性质；通过形态分解量化盘组分；采用随机森林回归和符号回归建立预测模型；使用SHAP分析特征重要性
AI.result: 晕性质能高精度预测盘大小和厚度；盘高度比盘大小更易预测；低质量晕预测精度更高；流体模拟中的晕性质预测效果优于纯暗物质模拟；最重要的晕参数包括浓度、Einasto形状、全局和内部自旋、近期质量吸积；盘大小与密度剖面形状的相关性主要源于盘诱导的内晕修改而非原始联系
AI.conclusion: 星系盘结构与暗物质晕性质存在系统性联系，但受重子物质重组影响；提供了基于符号回归的经验关系，可用于星系-晕建模；不同质量和红移下盘-晕关系存在差异
